title: CargoDocs Document
description: A trade or shipping document managed within the CargoDocs platform, such as a bill of lading, certificate of origin, or invoice.

documentId.description: The unique identifier for the document.

documentType.description: The type of document (e.g., eBoL, SWB, certificate, invoice).

status.description: The current status of the document.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the document was created.
